title: Rename Item Ui
description: Right click a nametag to rename it through a small UI, or use a command to rename any item.
body:
This mod allows you to rename an nametag inside a small UI by right-clicking it.

It also adds the `/rename_item` command, which shows the same UI, for any item.

That's all.

This mod was made with the help of [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
